description_long: This object consists of two stacked, thick, rectangular blocks of cheese, with the top block being a lighter yellow and the bottom block a slightly darker tan. The surfaces are smooth and flat, with sharp, well-defined edges and corners, giving the cheese a processed or semi-hard appearance. There are no visible holes, cracks, or textural variations on the surfaces, suggesting a uniform interior. The cheese blocks are unwrapped and have no visible rind, packaging, or branding. The overall form is geometric and clean, with the blocks slightly offset from each other, creating a visually interesting layered effect. The cheese is placed directly on a flat, neutral surface with no additional context or objects present.
description: Two stacked, rectangular blocks of smooth, yellow and tan cheese with clean edges and no visible holes or rind.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the offset stacking of the two cheese blocks, with the lighter block on top and both surfaces smooth and unblemished.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thickness of both blocks and the clear separation between the lighter top and darker bottom cheese.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the back edges of the cheese blocks, maintaining the same smooth, clean appearance.
description_view_3: Right-side view displaying the offset alignment and the flat, untextured surfaces of both cheese blocks.
